scripts.migrate:app1: docker compose exec backend-app1 php artisan migrate --force
scripts.migrate:app2: docker compose exec backend-app2 php artisan migrate --force
scripts.seed:app1: docker compose exec backend-app1 php artisan db:seed --force
scripts.seed:app2: docker compose exec backend-app2 php artisan db:seed --force
scripts.key:app1: docker compose exec backend-app1 php artisan key:generate --force
scripts.key:app2: docker compose exec backend-app2 php artisan key:generate --force
